To use the feature, users must turn the device off, then hold the side button

items.title: Android 17 can copy more data from iPhone including your iMessage history and homescreen
items.summary: Google is introducing a massive upgrade to its “Android Switch” tool in Android 17, with the ability to copy more data than ever when switching from iPhone to Android, and it might be able to copy more data than you get when moving between Android phones.

items.summary_translated: 谷歌在 Android 17 中对其“Android Switch”工具进行了大规模升级，从 iPhone 切换到 Android 时能够复制比以往更多的数据，并且可能比在 Android 手机之间移动时复制更多的数据。

items.title: Android 17 makes switching from iPhone to Android much easier, here’s how

items.title: Seeing Siri AI in action has me excited for the future
items.summary:
Like a great many people, I’ve been impatiently waiting to leave the Siri AI waitlist, and that finally happened last night. 
It’s early, but what I’ve seen so far has me very excited for the future …
items.title_translated: 看到 Siri AI 的实际应用让我对未来感到兴奋
items.summary_translated:
和很多人一样，我一直在不耐烦地等待离开 Siri AI 候补名单，这终于在昨晚发生了。 
虽然还为时过早，但到目前为止我所看到的一切让我对未来感到非常兴奋……

items.title: Android 17 fixes wireless ADB headaches with ADB Wi-Fi 2.0
items.summary: Google ditches bloated third-party code for a custom Rust library that finally makes wireless debugging reliable.

items.summary_translated: Google 放弃了臃肿的第三方代码，转而采用自定义 Rust 库，最终使无线调试变得可靠。

items.title: Feature Request: Apple Intelligence provides a new opportunity to block junk notifications
items.summary:
Looking back, I was surprised to see it’s been more than eight years since I put my iPhone on a notifications diet. My iPhone is a far calmer place because of this.
But there’s another long-standing issue with notifications: there’s still no way to separate useful ones from marketing and other junk
items.title_translated: 功能请求：Apple Intelligence 提供了阻止垃圾通知的新机会
items.summary_translated:
回想起来，我惊讶地发现我已经八年多没有把 iPhone 的通知节食了。因此，我的 iPhone 变得更加平静。
但通知还有另一个长期存在的问题：仍然无法将有用的通知与营销和其他垃圾分开

items.title: Preview on iOS 27 inherits fun Liquid Glass easter egg from iPadOS 26

items.title: Apple explains why Siri’s major iOS 27 overhaul took so long

items.title: iOS 26.5.2 update likely coming soon for iPhone users
items.summary:
While much of the attention has shifted to iOS 27, that update won’t ship to customers until later this year. In the meantime, iOS 26 remains the iPhone software version in use by iPhone users everywhere. 
As such, Apple appears to be prepping iOS 26.5.2 as an upcoming bug fix update …

items.summary: Today, Apple announced that the iPhone and iPad have become the first consumer devices approved for use on classified NATO networks. items.title: This iOS 26.3 feature is a sign of what’s to come for iPhone
items.summary:
With iOS 26.3, Apple is rolling out a new feature that lets you limit the information that cellular networks can use to determine your location. The twist, however, is that the feature is only supported on devices powered by Apple’s in-house modem.
I think what’s more interesting than this specific

items.title: iOS 26 Adoption Hits 50%, But Some Users Are Still Reluctant to Update
items.summary:
iOS 26 adoption now hovers at around 50%, according to StatCounter, but some users are still cautious about updating. 




New data published by SellCell provides a look at how users have responded to the push to update to ‌iOS 26‌. The findings are based on a January 2026 survey of 2,000 U.S.-based
items.title_translated: iOS 26 采用率达到 50%，但部分用户仍不愿更新
items.summary_translated:
根据 StatCounter 的数据，iOS 26 的采用率目前徘徊在 50% 左右，但一些用户仍然对更新持谨慎态度。 




SellCell 发布的新数据让我们了解了用户对更新至 iOS 26 的推动有何反应。该调查结果基于 2026 年 1 月对 2,000 名美国受访者进行的调查
